config.name: juniper_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: juniper_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:06:52.224607

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local timestamp_pattern = "^(%w+)%s+(%d+)%s+(%d+):(%d+):(%d+)"
local ip_pattern = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"

-- Local helper functions for performance
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    return string.match(ip, ip_pattern) ~= nil
end

local function parse_timestamp(ts)
    if not ts then return nil end
    local month, day, hour, min, sec = string.match(ts, timestamp_pattern)
    if not month then return nil end
    -- Basic timestamp validation
    if tonumber(day) > 31 or tonumber(hour) > 23 or tonumber(min) > 59 or tonumber(sec) > 59 then
        return nil
    end
    return os.time({
        year = os.date("*t").year,
        month = month,
        day = tonumber(day),
        hour = tonumber(hour),
        min = tonumber(min),
        sec = tonumber(sec)
    }) * 1000
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with detailed error messages
    if not record then
        return nil, "Record is nil"
    end
    if type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, string.format("Invalid record type: %s", type(record))
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local variables
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Network Activity",
        category_uid = 1, 
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Juniper Networks Firewall",
                vendor = "Juniper Networks"
            }
        },
        src_endpoint = {},
        device = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp processing with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        local parsed_time = parse_timestamp(record.timestamp)
        if parsed_time then
            output.time = parsed_time
        else
            output.time = os.time() * 1000 -- Fallback to current time
            output.metadata.parsing_errors = output.metadata.parsing_errors or {}
            table.insert(output.metadata.parsing_errors, "Invalid timestamp format")
        end
    end

    -- IP address processing with validation
    if record.src and record.src.ip and record.src.ip.address then
        local src_ip = record.src.ip.address
        if validate_ip(src_ip) then
            output.src_endpoint.ip = src_ip
        else
            output.metadata.parsing_errors = output.metadata.parsing_errors or {}
            table.insert(output.metadata.parsing_errors, "Invalid source IP format")
        end
    end

    -- Hostname processing with sanitization
    if record.endpoint and record.endpoint.name then
        local hostname = record.endpoint.name
        -- Basic hostname sanitization
        hostname = string.match(hostname, "^[%w%.%-]+$")
        if hostname then
            output.device.hostname = hostname
        end
    end

    -- Additional metadata enrichment
    output.observability = {
        parser_version = "latest",
        ingestion_time = os.time() * 1000
    }

    -- Final validation
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    return output
end

-- Error recovery function
local function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

    local output = {

        type_uid = 100101,

    -- IP address processing with validation
    if record.src and record.src.ip and record.src.ip.address then
        local src_ip = record.src.ip.address
        if validate_ip(src_ip) then
            output.src_endpoint.ip = src_ip
        else
            output.metadata.parsing_errors = output.metadata.parsing_errors or {}
            table.insert(output.metadata.parsing_errors, "Invalid source IP format")

    if record.endpoint and record.endpoint.name then

-- Error recovery function
local function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
